task_title: Process every flagged order through resolution

scores.justification: The final answer provides explicit per-order decisions for all three flagged orders (o102, o107, o115) with detailed rationale: o102 escalate (legacy product + price mismatch), o107 escalate (extreme 7.8x price mismatch), o115 escalate (inactive product sold + price mismatch).
